title: not supported '{default:1'b0} to array
body:
---


Author Name: **Jie Xu** (@jiexu)
Original Redmine Issue: 769 from https://www.veripool.org
Original Date: 2014-05-15
Original Assignee: Wilson Snyder (@wsnyder)

---

Got error "assignment pattern applies against non struct/union: BASICDTYPE: 'logic'"

for example:
```
logic [31:0] data;

assign data = '{default:1'b0};

```
